text: Saulo ebisi as…Ы, вАЬApalete, wonu afana?вАЭ EbuiliuluћГ ak…Ф…Ы as…Ы, вАЬM…Ыinu Yesu, an…Ф n…ФћА g…Ы yiede w…Фt…Фn…Ф…Ф.вАЭ
translated: Saul asked, вАЬApolo, what is your name?вАЭ Apollos replied, вАЬMy name is Apollos, and I am a Jew.

ref: But you have surely seen and heard how this man Paul is upsetting a lot of people, not only in Ephesus, but almost everywhere in Asia. He claims that the gods we humans make are not really gods at all.
text: K…Ыl…Ы n…Фm…ФћА p…Ы n…ФoluћГ kana g…Ы Paulo any…Ы al…Ы etsyina banun…Ф ekpe…Цekpe…Цe…Ы m…Ы, p…Ы agbana ban…ФkpekpeћА…Ы atsa…Цak…Ы idzo n…Ы Efoso…Ф n…ЫћА Asia b…Фd…ФћГ m…Ы petee tsy…Ы. A…Ц…Ф as…Ы ibudi…Ы g…Ы ban…Фdzyrame…Ы abh…Ыt…Ы tinu akaa nanaћА.
translated: When Paul was in Ephesus, he preached the gospel for three years, so that all the inhabitants of Asia might hear it. He also taught them diligently, and he was careful to warn them against false teachings.

ref: You must tell everyone what you have seen and heard.
text: W…ФbodziћА an…Ф g…Ы …Фb…Ф…Ц…Фa…Ц…Ф …Фdal…Ы y…Ыishu …Фk…Ф banun…Ф petee n…Ы k…Ыg…Ы …Фm…Ф p…Ы oluћГ…Ф shu.
translated: They are saying that the bad thing is that the king is not listening to the people and he is ruling unjustly.
